beats.what: A person chops diced zucchini on a wooden cutting board with a knife.
The person continues chopping zucchini into small pieces on the board.
The person finishes dicing the zucchini on the wooden board.

formal.text: A person dices zucchini on a wooden board.
The person continues the dicing process.
The dicing of the zucchini concludes.

sarcastic.text: A real culinary revolution is unfolding here.
Stunning technique. Truly. The suspense is palpable.
Riveting. Someone get this person a Michelin star.

humorous_tech.text: Running a heavy batch process on a local machine.
Processing incoming data packets at high frequency.

humorous_non_tech.text: First, we tackle the green little guys.
They are putting up a real fight.
And just like that, they have surrendered.
